column1: # NullPlayer third-party components manifest (source of truth for bundled notices)
#   key   name   spdx   copyright   source_url   version   license_text   bundle_glob
# - key: component id. For packages in Package.resolved, this must match the
#   package identity so validate_notices.sh can detect uncovered package pins.
# - license_text: path to the required license text, relative to the app's
#   Resources/ directory (these files are shipped inside the app bundle).
# - bundle_glob: basename glob for the corresponding artifact in
#   /dylib to match one entry). Use "-" for components compiled into the
# See docs/third-party-notices.md for the refresh process.
